title: Bridge Essay: Respiration-Driven Brain Oscillations in Emotional Cognition.
concept: 4E cognition — embodied, enactive, extended, embedded mind.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Mind as Computer Critique** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** 4E cognition — embodied, enactive, extended, embedded mind.

**Respiration-Driven Brain Oscillations in Emotional Cognition.** - Front Neural Circuits (2021). DOI: 10.3389/fncir.2021.761812. PMID: 34790100. Respiration paces brain oscillations and the firing of individual neurons, revealing a profound impact of rhythmic breathing on brain activity. Intriguingly, respiration-driven entrainment of neural activity occurs in a variety of cortical areas, including those involved in higher cognitive functions such as associative neocortical regions and the hippocampus.
